case_title: TEI GUNDOLFI VS. CROSS COUNTRY RELOCATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00);REASON FOR NON-SERVICE: DOOR OPEN BUT NO ONE PRESENT AT LOCATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUNDOLFI, TEI AS TO DEFENDANT CROSS COUNTRY RELOCATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $226.08 SERVED FEB-09-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CROSS COUNTRY RELOCATION
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GUNDOLFI, TEI AS TO DEFENDANT CROSS COUNTRY RELOCATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO MAR-01-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO RE-DO AND FILE A PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-12-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TEI GUNDOLFI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CROSS COUNTRY RELOCATION IS NOT PRESENT. CORRECTED PROOF OF SERVICE IS INVALID: PARTY SERVED OUT OF STATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUNDOLFI, TEI
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-04-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-17-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TEI GUNDOLFI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CROSS COUNTRY RELOCATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF TEI GUNDOLFI PRESENT TO COURTROOM CLERK A COPY OF PROOF OF SERVICE ON HER SMARTPHONE AND PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED BY COURTROOM CLERK THAT PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED TO FILE WITH THE COURT AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE COURT DATE. INSTRUCTED PLAINTIFF TO FILE WITH THE FILING OFFICE. LATER, WAS CONTACTED BY FILING CLERK WHEN PLAINTIFF WAS FILING THE PROOF OF SERVICE IN RM 103 THAT THE PROOF OF SERVICE SECTION 4(A) PERSONAL SERVICE BOX IS CHECKED, AND SECTION 4(B) SUBSTITUTED SERVICE BOX IS ALSO CHECKED; PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO RE-DO AND FILE A PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT CROSS COUNTRY RELOCATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
